response:
Nurse Emily organized a creative writing workshop for the 24 residents in her care facility. She divided them into groups of 6, resulting in 4 groups in total. To ensure a productive session, she planned to provide 3 writing prompts per group, which totals 12 prompts. Additionally, she prepared 10 extra prompts to be shared equally among all the groups. These extra prompts will be distributed so that each group can have an equal opportunity to explore more writing ideas. Emily also made sure that the writing prompts are stored in the library for easy access and that the library is well-organized to support the residents' creativity. The library serves as a central resource for all materials, including the writing prompts. 

The total number of writing prompts Emily needs to prepare is 12 initial prompts plus 10 extra prompts, resulting in 22 writing prompts in total. 

The END.
